title: AutoSplit
description: Defines rules for automatically allocating or splitting transactions based on matching criteria, typically used during bank statement imports or manual transaction entry. Internal Name: AutoSplit (file_num: 22).

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for the AutoSplit rule record.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the rule was modified.

MatchFunction.description: The MoneyWorks expression used to determine if a transaction matches this rule. Can check fields like Memo, Payee, Amount.

SplitMode.description: Determines the action to take when a match occurs (e.g., allocate to specific accounts, discard, pay invoice). 0: Allocate, 1: Discard Transaction, 2: Pay Invoice(s).

SplitAcct1.description: The first account code (potentially including department) for allocation.

SplitAcct2.description: The second account code (potentially including department) for allocation.

SplitAmount1.description: The percentage or fixed amount to allocate to SplitAcct1.

SplitAmount2.description: The percentage or fixed amount to allocate to SplitAcct2.

SplitAcct3.description: The third account code (potentially including department) for allocation.

SplitAcct4.description: The fourth account code (potentially including department) for allocation, typically used for the remainder.

SplitAmount3.description: The percentage or fixed amount to allocate to SplitAcct3.

MatchName.description: A user-defined name or identifier for the rule.

Priority.description: Determines the order in which rules are evaluated (higher priority rules are checked first). (Mutable: freely, script-only)
